name: anti-hall
description: Anti-hallucination tooling for Claude Code — verify-first behavior, installable on any machine and any repo.

plugins.name: anti-hall
plugins.description: Verify-first per-turn hook (no cause-no-fix, evidence before claims, no fake completion) + skills: root-cause debugging, orchestration (non-blocking swarm), plan-first deadly-loop-gated feature-launch. Optional graphify hooks (search-first + keep-updated) and a monorepo/simple statusline.
